cases.naive_form: naive Euclidean embedding x->(x, sigma x)
cases.naive_failure: inner products include +-1/2; not even-integral E8
cases.corrected_property: shell1 U (1/phi)shell1 = 240 roots, norm^2=2, ips{-2..2}, even integral E8 (56,56,126,1,1)
cases.limits: known Wilson/Moody-Patera construction, VERIFIED not discovered

cases.naive_form: Li/Toeplitz moment kernel; prime-only Euler product; no-Gamma
cases.naive_failure: naive kernels not PSD; prime-only diverges at s=1; smooth-PNT over-capacity (mu=1.26>1)
cases.completed_form: completed Weil/Connes quadratic form D=H-R, H=A(arch Gamma)+P(pole)
cases.corrected_property: H PSD after pole lift; K=H^-1/2 R H^-1/2; RH <=> ||K||<=1; finite compressions PSD
cases.residual_after: finite-cutoff PSD validated; full-limit positivity UNRESOLVED (=RH)
cases.limits: the correct/canonical form is identified (the explicit formula) but does NOT prove positivity; RH is the standing COUNTEREXAMPLE to 'right form => closure'

cases.naive_form: static geometry / compressed-funnel shape / mode counting
cases.naive_failure: static geometry is cosmetic (radius bijective); no new invariant
cases.completed_form: scattering determinant / Jost function + boundary flux form
cases.corrected_property: Gamma-determinant -> digamma response -> resonances; damped QNMs for real(self-adjoint) potential
cases.self_adjoint_or_positive: toy_validated; arithmetic instance = self-adjointness = Hilbert-Polya = RH (analogy_only, no proof transfer)
cases.residual_after: shared determinant/log-derivative architecture with arithmetic; NO proof transfer
cases.limits: analogy/known scattering framework; toy provable because real potential; arithmetic self-adjointness OPEN

law.lens: self-adjointness/positivity/integrality is FORM-RELATIVE; completion to the canonical invariant trace/flux form can repair a naive failure
law.exact_exemplar: H4->E8 (golden trace form c=1+1/sqrt5, derived, delivers closure)
law.crucial_limit: right form is NECESSARY not SUFFICIENT; RH is the counterexample (canonical Weil/Connes form known + finite-positive, full positivity=RH open)
